default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Knowledge transfer and workflow improvement discussion between Strapi and GrowthX teams.](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Citations in recent content batches were missing; team to investigate and improve](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [New refresh workflow being rolled out this week, offering more flexibility and internal expertise integration](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [8 new integration pages (total 33) uploaded to backend; publishing schedule TBD](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Content quality has improved, with less comparison to competitors and more Strapi-focused recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Workflow Improvement Requests

  - [Theodore expressed interest in creating workflows, particularly for batch updating SEO-unoptimized blog post descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Jimmy explained workflow building is complex, often taking months and hundreds of hours to perfect](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Suggested using AROPS pre-defined templates and leveraging existing resources like the CO-STAR framework for prompt engineering](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### Citation and Content Quality

  - [Theodore noted missing citations in recent content batches](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Andrej to check with CTO on citation logic and potential improvements](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Content quality praised overall, with noticeable improvements in Strapi-focused recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Request to update links referencing Strapi V4 features to newer V5 content](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

### New Refresh Workflow

  - [Rolling out this week for batches of 10 articles](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Aims to add new content, context, stats, and external sources](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
  - [More details to be shared in tomorrow's official meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Integration Pages Update

  - [8 new integration pages uploaded, bringing total to 33 in backend](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Publishing schedule to be determined](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Maxine to review and provide feedback on technical depth](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to discuss citation logic and improvements with CTO](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Implement automated linking to Strapi V5 features in content](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Human review of Strapi version mentions until automation is in place](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Theo to publish 2-3 new articles from drafts](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Andrej to check with Maxine regarding integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [More detailed discussion planned for tomorrow's official meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xcGsD7sJf1bnTfytuxVGtv-5fzdBznnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

action_items.description: Check w/ CTO re citation logic for Strapi; discuss tweaking to include more detailed external sources
Implement V5 knowledge base in workflow; ensure links/mentions ref new Strapi V5 features, not V3/V4
Double-check mentions of Strapi versions manually until automation implemented
Publish 2-3 new articles from drafts at convenience
